app.title: ggsql: A Grammar of Graphics for SQL
app.author: thomasp85
proposed_tests: Install ggsql R package, create a new chart, measure chart quality
Query a database, visualize results with ggsql, compare vs other viz tools
Compare ggsql chart styles vs ggplot2
